iotevents.alarmmodel.firehose.CfnAbout: Sends information about the detector model instance and the event that triggered the action to an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream.

iotevents.alarmmodel.firehose.DeliverySt.Description: The name of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream where the data is written.

iotevents.alarmmodel.firehose.Payload.Description: You can configure the action payload when you send a message to an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream.

iotevents.alarmmodel.firehose.Separator.Description: A character separator that is used to separate records written to the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream. Valid values are: 'n' (newline), 't' (tab), 'rn' (Windows newline), ',' (comma).
